title: Therizinosaurus in Jungle Forest Coloring Page
seoTitle: Therizinosaurus in Jungle Forest Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Therizinosaurus displaying its giant hand claws inside a dense forest jungle. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Therizinosaurus used its giant scythe-like claws to gather leaves from high branches and defend itself from predators.
Therizinosaurus was a theropod—the same group that includes carnivores like T-Rex—but it adapted to eat plants.
